description_long: This is a two-story brick pub named 'Wild West Arms', featuring a prominent wooden sign with a star above the entrance. The facade is symmetrical, with four large rectangular windows on the upper floor and two on the lower, flanking a central single-door entrance. The building sits on a raised wooden platform with two wooden railings on either side of the entrance, evoking a classic Western saloon style. The roof is gabled and dark, with a simple triangular pediment above the sign. The side and rear walls are plain, each with two evenly spaced windows per floor, and the structure is set on a light-colored base. The overall appearance is rustic, with red brick walls, black roof, and wooden architectural accents.
description: A two-story red brick pub with a wooden 'Wild West Arms' sign, symmetrical windows, and a central entrance flanked by wooden railings, styled like a classic Western saloon.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'Wild West Arms' sign, central entrance, four upper and two lower windows, and wooden railings on a raised platform.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying two floors, each with two windows, and the depth of the wooden platform.
description_view_2: Rear view with four windows (two per floor), no signage or entrance, and a clear view of the gabled roof.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with two windows per floor and the wooden platform visible.
attribute_signage: A large, wall-mounted wooden sign above the main entrance, rectangular in shape, with the text 'WILD WEST ARMS' and a black star symbol, styled in bold black letters.
attribute_entrance_design: One main entrance located at the center of the front facade, single rectangular door, likely wood, flanked by two wooden railings, with a small raised platform leading to it. No visible decorative elements beyond the railings and sign.
attribute_window_arrangement: Eight rectangular windows, four on the upper floor and four on the lower, symmetrically arranged on all visible sides. All windows are the same size and shape, with a regular grid pattern.
attribute_architectural_style: Western Rustic, characterized by red brick walls, wooden railings, a prominent wooden sign, and a gabled roof reminiscent of classic American frontier saloons.
